title: Morning Devotional Journal - 90 Days of Guided Reflection (Hardcover)
description: A 90-day guided devotional journal designed for early morning quiet time. Each day opens with a short scripture, a reflection prompt, and space for gratitude and prayer. Lay-flat hardcover binding with thick cream pages. Crafted for those who want to start their day grounded before the noise begins.

title: Howard Thurman - Jesus and the Disinherited (Paperback)
description: A foundational text of liberation theology and the nonviolent civil rights movement. Howard Thurman's clear-eyed analysis of the gospel for those who stand with their backs against the wall remains as urgent now as when it was first published. New foreword by Vincent Harding.
bulletPoints: Howard Thurman's landmark work on faith and justice|Foundation text cited by Dr. Martin Luther King Jr.|New foreword by Vincent Harding|Compact paperback - ideal for small group study|Ships same day from Memphis, TN

title: Henri Nouwen - The Wounded Healer (Paperback)
description: Henri Nouwen's enduring reflection on the paradox that ministers who have faced their own wounds become more effective healers. Essential reading for chaplains, pastors, healthcare workers, and anyone who serves others from a place of personal suffering.
bulletPoints: Henri Nouwen's foundational text on ministry and suffering|Core reading for chaplaincy and pastoral care|Practical and spiritual - bridges theology and caregiving|Ideal for small group or individual study|Ships same day from Memphis, TN
